title: Incorrect Join result in the join condition containing Cast operator and additional true expression
description:
## Bug Report

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 BOOL);
CREATE TABLE t1(c0 DOUBLE);

INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (0.5);
INSERT INTO t0 VALUES (true);

SELECT *
FROM t0
         INNER JOIN t1
                    ON (t1.c0 >= t0.c0) = CAST((CASE WHEN t1.c0 >= t0.c0 THEN FALSE ELSE t1.c0 END) AS DATETIME);


SELECT *
FROM t0
         INNER JOIN t1
                    ON (t1.c0 >= t0.c0) = CAST((CASE WHEN t1.c0 >= t0.c0 THEN FALSE ELSE t1.c0 END) AS DATETIME)
                        AND (true = t0.c0);
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
These two query should produce same result, because the additional `AND (true = t0.c0)` will always be true.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
The first query produces empty result, but the second query produces the following data.
```
+------+------+
| c0   | c0   |
+------+------+
|    1 |  0.5 |
+------+------+
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

```
Release Version: v9.0.0-alpha-381-g739a934f63
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 739a934f631eb413ff3b150b0a7fc9db55eefcbd
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2025-03-10 06:22:18
GoVersion: go1.23.7
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(10));
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 FLOAT, c1 DATE);
SELECT * FROM t2 INNER JOIN t3 ON (t3.c0 >= t2.c0::FLOAT) = (t2.c1 IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Join condition with Cast operator and additional true expression
